title: Heavy Spear
description: Adds a new item called the Heavy Spear, which is a new overpowered spear without hit cooldown, and wind burst
body:
All this data pack adds is a new item called the **Heavy Spear**.

The Heavy Spear is crafted with two breeze rods and one heavy core, in the same shape as you would craft a spear

![Crafting recipe for Heavy Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/114ebff92f32f3f541a015a35471ed6202334331.png)

The Spear is by default enchanted with wind burst 5 and lunge 5, making it very powerful for movement

The resource pack linked below will change the look of all golden spears, but who uses them anyway? (Besides piglins)

LINK TO RESOURCE PACK (not required):
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/heavy-spear-pack
